scripts.build:mobile: bash -c 'mv src/app/api src/app/_api_excluded && trap "mv src/app/_api_excluded src/app/api" EXIT && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=https://foodortrash.com next build'
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
